global_impression: This sagittal T1-weighted MRI of the brain demonstrates normal anatomy without evidence of acute pathology. The gray matter, white matter, ventricles, sulci, gyri, thalamus, cerebellum, and brainstem all appear within normal limits for a 28-year-old male.
